description: List antigravity structure and search for token/config files (depth 2 only)
command_preview: Write-Output '=== Subdirectories ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\antigravity" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Write-Output '=== Files at root ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\antigravity" -File | Select-Object Name, Length; Write-Output '=== Search token/key files ==='; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\antigravity" -Recurse -File -Include '*.env','*.json','*.txt','*.cfg','*.ini','*.yaml','*.yml','*.toml','*.key','*.token' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 2 | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize
